历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 12600 → 14061 → 13934 → 15356 → 16067, showing a continuous backward trend overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 3467 places in the past 4 years; the 2025 baseline is about 16067, the highest (largest number) in recent years; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hubei Province has been continuously expanding: 59 in 2021, 62 in 2022, 65 in 2023, 70 in 2024, 76 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 84, an increase of 8 (+10.5%) compared to 2025, a significant expansion that intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Donghua University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university; its main ranking on the Soft Science Ranking has steadily risen from 81st in 2021 to 72nd in 2026, enhancing its appeal to candidates; its reputation has been stable in recent years, with no significant negative public opinion; its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 96th (average), with moderate short video exposure, showing no signs of a cold snap or gap; Materials Science and Engineering is an A-level discipline (fifth round evaluation), directly corresponding to the university's enrollment majors such as Materials and Functional Materials; Textile Science and Engineering is a Double First-Class construction discipline, and related majors (Textiles, Fashion Design and Engineering) have industry-specific advantages.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are all highly recommended/recommended in the 2024–2026 major popularity analysis, with high social application enthusiasm; the number of Physics Category candidates in Hubei Province in 2026 is expected to be about 251,000, a slight increase (+0.5%) compared to 2025, expanding the competition base; Donghua University is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city university, which has strong regional appeal to Hubei candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the 10.5% expansion of the Physics Category enrollment plan in 2026 intensifying competition, the steady rise in the university's Soft Science ranking enhancing attractiveness, the high application enthusiasm for popular engineering majors, and the slight increase in the number of local candidates, the ranking is expected to continue moving backward based on the 2025 baseline of 16067; the predicted minimum ranking is about 17032, with a range of 16532–17532.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 16532–17532, it is recommended to use Tier 2 majors as the main choice, Tier 1 majors as a reach, and Tier 3 majors as safety; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<16532), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 popular engineering majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information; if your ranking is close to the upper limit (>17532), you should use Tier 3 majors like Materials and Textiles as safety, while also considering Tier 2 moderate-difficulty majors like Management Science and Engineering.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 2989 → 3225 → 3395 → 3324, fluctuating within the 3000–3400 range, with a baseline of about 3324 in 2025. The enrollment plan for this university in Hubei Province for History Category: 14 in 2022, 16 in 2023, 11 in 2024, 11 in 2025; 17 in 2026, an increase of 6 (+54.5%) compared to 2025, a significant expansion that notably intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Donghua University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 81st in 2021 to 72nd in 2026, showing consistent improvement and some appeal to liberal arts candidates. In recent years, its reputation has been stable with no significant negative public opinion. Its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 96th (average), with no signs of unexpected popularity or gaps. Materials Science and Engineering is an A-level discipline (fifth round evaluation), which, although not directly related to liberal arts majors, reflects the overall academic strength of the university. Textile Science and Engineering is a Double First-Class construction discipline, highlighting industry characteristics.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Economics and Trade, and Economic Management Experimental Class show divided social popularity, while Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged. In 2026, the number of History Category examinees in Hubei Province is estimated at about 142,700, a slight increase (+0.9%) from 2025. Donghua University is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city with strong locational advantages that attract liberal arts candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking fluctuation trend, the significant 54.5% expansion (actual increase of 6) in the 2026 History Category enrollment plan intensifying competition, the steady rise in Soft Science ranking enhancing overall appeal, and the divided popularity of economics and management majors, the ranking is expected to shift significantly backward from the 2025 baseline of 3324. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 4382, with a range of 3882–4882.
